title: Mouthwatering Silky Jamaican Fish Curry
description: A rich and indulgent Jamaican dish featuring fish in a silky curry sauce, infused with the earthy flavors of shallots and spices, simmered to perfection in a kadhai vessel.
instructions: Heat the oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add the chopped shallots and saute until they are softened and translucent.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish fillets and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Add the coconut milk, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the fish curry hot, garnished with chopped scotch bonnet peppers if desired.
